@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide circle

package "expr" {
    package "repl" {
        interface REPL <<I>> { loop(): void }
        ConsoleREPL -up-|> ExpressionEvaluatorConfig : uses > 
        REPLEvaluator --* REPL : creates > 

        note right of REPL::loop()
            Main read-eval-print-loop for user input processing.
        endnote
        
        ' Placeholder classes to satisfy relationships without cluttering main view
        [ConsoleREPL] as CR
        [ExpressionParser] as EP2
        [DefaultExpressionFactory] as DEF3
        [IntExpressionFactory] as IEF4
        FPAddExpression --> FPMulExpression : binds >> T.Double
        FPSubExpression ..> IntsPackageFrame :: SubExpression : extends <
